arts.sum: 'I like the fact that he has found a place where he’s thriving.'

arts.sum: There’s a club in the Premier League that worries about Chelsea reigniting interest in their player. If you look at the transfer pattern under the...

arts.ttl: Latest Chelsea injury news for Gent as Enzo Maresca delivers Reece James update
arts.sum: Chelsea will be without Cole Palmer and four other players for Thursday’s Europa Conference League clash against Gent, yet almost have a clean bill of health. Meanwhile, Maresca has confirmed that Reece James will not be making an unexpected return from injury on Thursday as the club captain continues to battle his latest hamstring setback.

arts.ttl: Enzo Fernandez shows true Chelsea colours with two-word Reece James message
arts.sum: However, the former Manchester City star will not be available for Chelsea's next clash which comes in the Conference League against Gent as he was left out of the squad for the group stages . Nonetheless, it did allow James the chance to provide an update on his potential injury return date with Fernandez seemingly very excited at the prospect of playing alongside him soon.

arts.ttl: Top five transfer targets for YOUR fantasy teams in Gameweek 7: Erling Haaland is backed to shine again as Cole Palmer looks to build on his four-goal haul - but who could be a top left-field pick according to FPL experts?
arts.sum: HOLLY SHAND: The battle for top spot in the Premier League table is on and that's led to plenty of points being dished out over the last few weeks, with some top price players shining.

arts.ttl: Chelsea made right call not signing £35m star despite what he just did in the Champions League - opinion
Cole Palmer set to be promoted into bigger England role by Lee Carsley... but Kyle Walker could be dropped from tomorrow's squad
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: England interim head coach Lee Carsley is ready to fire Cole Palmer to the forefront of his efforts to be handed the job on a permanent basis.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca speaks out over surprising Cole Palmer decision: 'He needs that'
arts.sum: Cole Palmer was left out of Chelsea's Europa League squad for the group stages of the competition and Blues boss Enzo Maresca believes the club's talisman needs the break

arts.ttl: Chelsea goalkeeper Robert Sanchez is not under pressure, says Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca dismisses suggestions that goalkeeper Robert Sanchez is under pressure to retain his place between the sticks for Premier League games.
